description: Spawns an ephemeral Ubuntu VM with project clone, shell exec, file I/O, and auto-destroy on TTL.
name: io.github.AlexikM/gibil

environmentVariables.description: Required when targeting Hetzner. Get from console.hetzner.com > Security > API Tokens.
environmentVariables.name: HETZNER_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Required when targeting Vultr. Get from my.vultr.com > Account > API. At least one provider token is required.
environmentVariables.name: VULTR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Used to clone private GitHub repos into the VM at boot via cloud-init.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Authenticates against gibil.dev for usage tracking and paid plans.
environmentVariables.name: GIBIL_API_KEY
